---
title: ""
---


TELE-SPEAK Nepal is led by highly qualified professionals with decades of experiences in speech, language, and hearing sciences dedicated to improving access to communication support across Nepal and the globe.

---

<div class="card" style="text-align:center;">

<img src="images/biraj.png" width="180" style="border-radius:50%; margin-bottom:15px;">

## Biraj Bhattarai

**Qualifications:**  

PhD Candidate in Communication Sciences and Disorders   
MS in Speech-Language Pathology    
BS in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology    

<br>

<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=JczcLwkAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Google Scholar |</a>
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/biraj-bhattarai-3172931a3/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>

</div>

---

<div class="card" style="text-align:center;">

<img src="images/sajana.png" width="180" style="border-radius:50%; margin-bottom:15px;">

## Dr. Sajana Aryal

**Qualifications:**  

PhD in Speech, Language, and Hearing Science  
MS in Audiology / Hearing Science  
BS in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology  

<br>

<i class="bi bi-globe"></i> <a href="https://sites.google.com/view/sajanaaryal/home" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Website |</a>
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&pli=1&user=BUryX9QAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar |</a>
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sajana-aryal-209612187/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

---

<div class="card" style="text-align:center;">

<img src="images/pratik.png" width="180" style="border-radius:50%; margin-bottom:15px;">

## Dr. Pratik Bhandari

**Qualifications:**  

PhD in Cognitive Science   
MS in Cognitive Neuroscience of Language   
BS in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology   

<br>

<i class="bi bi-globe"></i> <a href="https://www.pratikb.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Website |</a>
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> <a href="https://scholar.google.de/citations?user=Y0HnEQwAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar |</a>
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/prbhx/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>

</div>

---
